meaning: n.[鐢熷寲]鍗垫竻铔嬬櫧,鍗电櫧铔嬬櫧
examples: Methods Experimental asthma model of guinea pigs was induced by ovalbumin.
Methods a mouse model of asthma was established by sensitization with ovalbumin (ova).
The thermal denaturation of chicken ovalbumin were investigation by differential scanning calorimetry ( DSC ) .
